ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a Type 3E (3-bedroom + study) end-unit villa located in Springs 1, an established and highly sought-after gated community within the Emirates Living master development. Property Age and Maintenance: The Springs is an older community (completed mid-2000s). Buyers must budget for potential MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) issues, cosmetic renovations, or structural wear if the villa has not been recently upgraded.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied total price of approximately AED 5.77M (based on 3,695 sqft at AED 1,563/sqft), this property is priced at the premium end of the market for a Springs Type 3E. While Springs 1 offers excellent community amenities, high occupancy rates, and strong rental yields (typically 5-6% net), this specific listing is not the underpriced deal it appears to be when compared to the 'Emirates Hills' benchmark. Investors should verify the actual Built-Up Area (BUA) and renovation status before proceeding, as the true price per BUA sqft is likely well above the community average.

Betterhomes is proud to present this well maintained one bedroom apartment in the iconic DEC Tower 2, ideally situated in the heart of Dubai Marina.
Property Details

Size: 823 sq ft
Asking Price: AED 1,050,000
Current Rent: AED 80,000 per annum
Service Charges: AED 11 per sq ft (AED 9,053 per annum)
Gross ROI: 7.6%
Net ROI: 6.75%

About the Property
This spacious and bright apartment offers a functional layout with generous living space, a well-appointed kitchen, and a comfortable bedroom with ample storage. The unit enjoys beautiful views and is currently tenanted, making it an ideal ready investment for discerning buyers.
About DEC Tower 2
DEC Tower 2 is a well-established residential development in Dubai Marina, one of the most sought-after waterfront communities in Dubai. Residents enjoy direct access to the Marina Walk, an array of dining and retail options, and seamless connectivity to the rest of the city via Sheikh Zayed Road and the Dubai Metro.
Key Highlights

Prime Dubai Marina location
Currently tenanted at AED 80,000 per annum
Gross ROI of 7.6% and Net ROI of 6.75%
Strong rental demand in the area
Access to world-class amenities
Easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Metro

Contact us at Betterhomes for any inquiries and to arrange viewings.

description:
Experience elevated Marina living in this spacious 1-bedroom apartment in the iconic Princess Tower. Situated on a high floor and spanning 862 sqft, this fully furnished unit offers stunning golf course views along with a partial Marina skyline view, making it an excellent choice for both end users and investors alike.

The apartment features a bright and well-laid-out living space, modern furnishings, a generously sized bedroom, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and the panoramic outlook. Currently vacant on transfer, the property is ready for immediate occupancy or rental, presenting a strong investment opportunity in one of Dubai Marina’s most sought-after residential towers.

Residents of Princess Tower enjoy access to premium amenities including indoor and outdoor swimming pools, fully equipped gymnasiums, sauna and steam rooms, children’s play areas, and 24-hour security.

Rising along Sheikh Zayed Road, overlooking Dubai Canal, AYKON City Tower C opens your world to luxury living in one of the most prestigious neighborhoods in Dubai. All the apartments have modern finishes and are equipped with everything for a comfortable living. raw_area: Park Tower B, Park Towers, DIFC, Dubai
description:
DOM9 Properties is pleased to present this beautifully appointed 1-bedroom apartment in Park Towers B, DIFC, offering a compelling opportunity for both end users and savvy investors seeking long-term value in Dubai’s most prestigious financial district.

Spanning 881 sq. ft., this well-proportioned residence features a generous open-plan layout designed to maximize space, functionality, and natural light. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame attractive skyline views, creating a bright and inviting living environment ideal for modern urban living. The apartment is complemented by a fully fitted kitchen with appliances, built-in wardrobes, and high-quality finishes throughout, all maintained in excellent condition.

Located in the heart of DIFC — the leading financial center of Dubai and a globally recognized business hub — this property benefits from consistent demand driven by multinational corporations, financial institutions, and senior executives. DIFC’s recent major expansion announcement further reinforces its position as a global economic powerhouse, unlocking new commercial, residential, and lifestyle developments that are expected to drive strong capital appreciation and rental growth in the surrounding area.

This apartment presents an outstanding investment opportunity, suitable for short-term leasing, long-term rentals, or owner occupation with excellent future resale potential. Proximity to Gate Avenue, Downtown Dubai, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, and major transport links ensures sustained tenant demand and liquidity.

Whether you are looking to secure a high-performing DIFC asset, diversify your property portfolio, or acquire a premium city home in a blue-chip location, this Park Towers residence offers the perfect balance of lifestyle, yield, and future value.

Contact DOM9 Properties today to arrange a private viewing.

VYB at Business Bay is a modern off-plan residential tower in Dubai’s Business Bay developed by Ginco Properties, offering contemporary 1- and 2-bedroom apartments with stylish finishes and panoramic city views. It features lifestyle amenities such as a fitness centre, swimming pool, outdoor lounges and family-friendly spaces, with completion expected in late 2025. Situated in a prime urban location, VYB provides easy access to key business, leisure and retail hubs across Dubai.

Jade & Co was founded to provide a boutique approach to the Dubai Real Estate market, which caters way beyond beautiful properties, as our exceptional agents source a lifestyle to compliment you. Our purpose is to provide an unrivalled service in the market, whether you are buying, selling, or renting, and our approach allows us to walk alongside our clients at every stage of their journey. For Jade & Co, maintaining long-lasting relationships is at the core of our agency.

title: Best price in the entire building , sea view ,
raw_area: Central Park Residential Tower, Central Park Tower, DIFC, Dubai
description:
Living in this DIFC apartment feels like being at the heart of a dynamic, upscale urban environment. It's a space that effortlessly marries modern design with practical comfort, perfect for someone who values both style and convenience. The open layout of this 1109 sqft unit invites an air of freedom, making it an ideal canvas for personal expression. The apartment's layout is thoughtfully designed, featuring one bedroom and two bathrooms that create a balanced flow throughout the space. Central air conditioning ensures a comfortable climate year-round, while built-in wardrobes offer smart storage solutions. Though unfurnished, the space is primed for you to bring in your own touches, turning it into a reflection of your unique style. Residents here enjoy access to an array of top-tier amenities including a shared pool and spa, a modern gym, and a secure lobby attended by a concierge. For families or those who love company, there’s a children's play area and even a children’s pool, making it a pet-friendly and family-oriented community. The building also offers stunning views of notable landmarks, adding a touch of grandeur to everyday life. Located in DIFC, this residence places you in one of the city's most prestigious and luxurious communities. The area is a hub for professionals in the financial sector, surrounded by world-class art galleries, fine dining, and high-end shopping. Nearby, you'll find esteemed schools and several healthcare facilities, ensuring that all your essential needs are met without leaving the neighborhood. Priced at 2,400,000 AED, this is more than just a home—it's an investment in a lifestyle that combines luxury, convenience, and exclusivity. Act swiftly; properties in such a coveted location are unlikely to stay available for long. Schedule a viewing today to experience this exceptional opportunity firsthand.
Rented until September 2026.

Betterhomes proudly presents 1 bedroom apartment in Armada tower 3 - Cluster P - JLT 

Property Highlights:
Rented Currently - No notice served 
Park and Jumeirah Island view
Stunning Huge Balcony space
Standard unit

Mid Floor Unit
Bright and Airy

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

title: SPACIOUS 2BR + STUDY | LARGE BALCONY | MODERN
description:
Step into a refined lifestyle with this spacious 2-bedroom + study apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, located in the heart of Dubai Islands—Dubai’s next-generation waterfront destination. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, the project offers privacy, elegance, and a serene coastal living experience

This well-designed apartment spans approximately 1,221  featuring a generous layout that includes two comfortable bedrooms, a dedicated study room, and a bright open-plan living and dining area. The space flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for enjoying peaceful community and park views.

Both bedrooms are thoughtfully designed with built-in wardrobes and en-suite bathrooms, offering comfort and privacy. The additional study provides flexibility as a home office or extra functional space. The modern kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality cabinetry and contemporary finishes, blending style with practicality.

Residents benefit from a full lifestyle offering across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounge, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more

Ideally located, the project is just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai

description:
Presented by Betterhomes
, this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in Marina Views at Rashid Yachts & Marina offers a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. The modern layout combines comfort and sophistication, making it ideal for both investors and end users seeking long-term value in a prestigious community.

Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Set within the historic Port Rashid district, the community is designed around a world-class marina capable of accommodating luxury yachts, alongside beautifully landscaped promenades, fine dining, boutique retail, and exclusive leisure experiences.

Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.

title: LUXURY 3BR + MAID | LARGE LAYOUT | WATER LIVING
description:
Step into elevated waterfront living with this expansive 3-bedroom + maid’s apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, ideally located in Dubai Islands—one of Dubai’s most promising coastal destinations. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, this project offers exclusivity, privacy, and a refined island lifestyle 

Spanning approximately 2,033  this residence offers a generous and well-balanced layout, ideal for families and discerning buyers. The spacious living and dining area is designed with open-plan elegance, seamlessly connecting to large wraparound balconies.

The apartment features three well-proportioned bedrooms, including a master suite with walk-in wardrobe and en-suite bathroom, ensuring both comfort and privacy. A separate maid’s room adds practicality, while multiple bathrooms and a dedicated laundry area enhance functionality for everyday living.

The contemporary kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality finishes and integrated cabinetry, designed to complement the modern aesthetic of the home. Large windows throughout the residence allow natural light to flow in, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere 

Residents benefit from a curated selection of amenities across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounges, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more 

Strategically located, the project offers seamless connectivity—just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai 

Property Details:

• 3 Bedrooms + Maid’s Room
• Total Area: approx. 2,033 
• Large Wraparound Balconies
• Open-plan Living & Dining
• Premium Finishes & Modern Kitchen

Price: AED 5,651,000

Payment Plan: 50/50


Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in Maravéa Residences.

description:
This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom apartment in the highly sought-after Goldcrest Views 1 is now vacant and ready to move in immediately. Perfectly positioned in the heart of Jumeirah Lakes Towers, this home offers a fantastic balance of comfort, functionality, and modern living.

•	Vacant Now

The apartment features two generous en-suite bedrooms, both with direct access to balconies, allowing you to enjoy beautiful views and fresh air from every room. A dedicated maid’s room adds excellent practicality for family or professional living. The thoughtfully designed open kitchen flows seamlessly into the living and dining area, creating a bright and sociable space ideal for entertaining or everyday family life. The entire layout is Vastu compliant, promoting positive energy and harmony throughout the home.

With balconies accessible from all rooms, you’ll love the sense of openness and connection to the outdoors. Goldcrest Views 1 offers residents premium facilities and a prime location with easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road, metro stations, lakeside promenades, and an abundance of restaurants, supermarkets, and amenities.

This is a rare opportunity to own a well-planned, move-in ready home in one of JLT’s most popular towers.

title: ULTRA LUXURY 1 BEDROOM | SEA VIEWS | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Lia by Avenew, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Where London prestige meets Dubai’s waterfront brilliance — welcome to Chelsea Residences by DAMAC, an exclusive collection of branded homes inspired by the legacy of Chelsea F.C. and the elegance of coastal living.

This expansive 2-bedroom residence, covering 1,610 sqft, offers a masterfully crafted layout with refined interiors, sweeping sea views, and a seamless flow between indoor comfort and outdoor serenity. Designed for those who demand excellence, every corner of this home reflects premium craftsmanship, curated aesthetics, and a branded lifestyle unlike any other in the city.

• Grand 2-bedroom layout with premium fittings and finishes

description:

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

- 24/7 security and smart access

- Circle Mall with retail, dining and Spinneys
- 30+ landscaped community parks

Location and Connectivity:

Belgravia Square is an Ellington Properties development nestled within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities. Developed by Nakheel, JVC is home to over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, sports courts, and a vibrant selection of cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets. Circle Mall, the community's main retail hub, places everyday conveniences within easy reach.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers seamless connectivity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Media City, and Dubai Internet City. The building's location in District 14 places residents close to several reputable schools and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal home for professionals and families alike.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

Fully furnished, vacant, and move-in ready, the home includes two parking spaces.

Contact Leo Blomquist today to arrange your private viewing.

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations.

title: EXCLUSIVE WATERFRONT LIVING | PRIME LOCATION
raw_area: Hado by Beyond Tower B, Hado by Beyond, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Introducing this exceptional 3-bedroom residence at HADO by Beyond, offering a rare chance to own a spacious, sea-facing family home within one of Dubai Islands’ most design-forward waterfront communities.

Spanning an impressive 2318 sqft, this beautifully planned apartment delivers a harmonious balance of scale, comfort, and refined living. The residence features expansive living and dining areas complemented by floor-to-ceiling glazing, allowing uninterrupted sea and villa community views to flood the home with natural light. Each bedroom is generously proportioned to ensure privacy and comfort, while the master suite enjoys a tranquil outlook paired with premium finishes. A dedicated maid’s room and powder room enhance everyday practicality, making the home ideally suited for end users and long-term residents.

Inspired by Japanese minimalism, HADO residences are thoughtfully designed around balance, serenity, and timeless sophistication. Natural materials, soft neutral palettes, and clean architectural lines come together to create an atmosphere of understated luxury that is both contemporary and enduring.

Residents benefit from a comprehensive collection of resort-style amenities, including landscaped zen gardens, swimming pools, wellness spa, yoga studio, state-of-the-art fitness facilities, children’s play areas, social lounges, and curated retail offerings, all surrounded by lush greenery and located just moments from the beach.

The development features a highly attractive 50/50 payment plan:

10% on booking

10% one month from booking

30% during construction

50% on completion

With completion anticipated in Q3 2029, this structure offers flexible cash flow and strong long-term value for both investors and owner-occupiers.

Size: 2318 sqft

description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. description:
Experience refined coastal living in this exquisite 3-bedroom residence at Treppan Serenique, located in the exclusive Marina District of Dubai Islands. Designed for those who appreciate space, privacy, and uninterrupted sea views, this elegant apartment combines modern luxury with the tranquility of island life.

Offering a total area of 1,831.54 , the layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, beautifully connected to a sleek kitchen with high-end finishes and integrated appliances. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the space with natural light and open onto three private balconies, each offering different vantage points of the surrounding sea, resort-style landscapes, and the peaceful island horizon.

All three bedrooms are generously sized and fitted with built-in wardrobes, with the master suite enjoying access to a dedicated balcony and spa-inspired ensuite. A separate powder room, a maid’s room, and a dedicated store room add exceptional functionality to the home.

As a resident of Treppan Serenique, you’ll enjoy:

 Infinity-edge pool overlooking the sea Wellness center and fitness studio Private beach access Concierge, valet, and 24/7 security Kids’ play areas and lush landscaped gardens 
Perfectly positioned near world-class hotels, dining, and the upcoming Wynn Casino, this address blends serene waterfront living with urban convenience.

title: Stunning Beachfront Apartment on Palm Jumeirah
raw_area: Orla by Omniyat, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
This spectacular four bedroom apartment is positioned within the highly prestigious Orla by Omniyat — managed by Dorchester Collection — on the Palm’s Crescent.

Crafted by Foster + Partners with a vision to establish a strong and seamless connection between the indoors and outdoors, it spans 8,010 sq.ft. and presents exceptionally tasteful interiors.

The living area comes as the apartment’s social and entertainment core. Double-height ceilings enhance the sense of scale and light, with the full-height glazing framing framing views of the Palm and the Arabian sea. Just outside, a vast balcony offers the perfect al fresco space with unbeatable vistas and the comfort of a private swimming pool.

Sleek and well-appointed with top-tier European appliances, the show kitchen is supported by a closed preparation kitchen — making for an elaborate culinary setup. Each bedroom is ensuite, and served by generous balconies.

The home also benefits from a maid’s room, an office, and four parking spaces, alongside Orla’s world-class facilities. Stationed minutes from Atlantis the Palm and Atlantis The Royal, its setting places prime lifestyle, entertainment and dining destinations at the doorstep.

Palm Jumeirah stands as an iconic address worldwide. Well connected to Dubai’s key thoroughfares, it places coveted destinations including The View at The Palm, Palm West Beach, Club Vista Mare, and Palm Jumeirah Mall at a convenient distance.

Reach out to us to know more about this exquisite home.

description:
Discover an elevated lifestyle in this elegant 2-bedroom residence at Treppan Serenique, nestled within the prestigious Dubai Islands. With its serene coastal setting and refined architectural design, this residence offers an exceptional blend of comfort, privacy, and sophistication — ideal for both end-users and savvy investors seeking long-term value.

Spanning 989.17 , the apartment welcomes you into a spacious open-plan layout where contemporary design meets thoughtful functionality. The sunlit living and dining area flows seamlessly into a sleek modern kitchen, fully fitted with premium appliances and high-end finishes. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors lead to your private balcony, where you can unwind while taking in soothing sea views — a daily reminder that you’ve arrived somewhere special.

Both bedrooms are generously sized, with full-height wardrobes and carefully curated finishes that reflect Treppan’s commitment to luxury living. The master suite features its own tranquil outlook and access to a modern bathroom, while the secondary bedroom is ideal for guests, family, or a private study. 

As part of Treppan Serenique, residents enjoy access to a curated collection of resort-style amenities:

 Infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf State-of-the-art gym and wellness center Concierge and valet services Private beach access Kids’ play area 24/7 security and smart access controls 
Located within the vibrant Marina District of Dubai Islands, the community is designed for waterfront living with direct access to upcoming luxury hotels, retail promenades, and cultural attractions — all just minutes from Downtown Dubai and DXB International Airport.

description:
Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

This 2-bedroom residence spans 1,469 and offers a graceful layout connecting living, dining, and balcony spaces in harmony. Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. The home features a powder room, refined finishes, and generous ceiling heights that create an airy sense of calm – perfect for both leisure and family life.

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.

title: 2 Bed | Dual Aspect | Partial Upgrade
description:
Positioned within one of Al Barari’s most sought-after addresses, this beautifully presented two-bedroom residence in Seventh Heaven offers a rare blend of space, light, and dual-aspect living.

Spanning an impressive 2,662 sq.ft, the apartment has been thoughtfully maintained and selectively upgraded, creating a turnkey home that balances contemporary design with everyday functionality. The expansive open-plan living and dining area is framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing, drawing in natural light throughout the day and seamlessly connecting to two private balconies - each offering a distinct outlook and the choice between tranquil northern or sun-soaked southern exposure.

The kitchen is sleek and refined, complete with a central island and high-quality integrated appliances, flowing effortlessly into the main living space - ideal for both entertaining and relaxed daily living.

Both bedrooms are generously proportioned, with upgraded flooring adding warmth and sophistication. The secondary bedroom enjoys open views towards the Downtown skyline, while the principal suite offers a more private retreat with ample storage and a well-appointed en-suite. Additional enhancements include bespoke built-in TV walls and a refined entrance hallway, elevating the overall finish of the home.

A standout feature rarely found in similar layouts is the large dedicated laundry and storage room, providing exceptional practicality without compromising on living space.

Set within the greenery of Al Barari, Seventh Heaven remains one of Dubai’s most architecturally distinct developments, offering residents a unique lifestyle surrounded by nature, yet within close proximity to the city.

This is an ideal opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking a spacious, well-upgraded apartment in one of Dubai’s most prestigious communities.

raw_area: Hado by Beyond Tower B, Hado by Beyond, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Introducing a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence at HADO by Beyond, offering exceptional value within the prestigious Dubai Islands.

This beautifully designed 2-bedroom apartment spans 1,236 sq ft and delivers a perfect balance of space, natural light, and everyday comfort. The open-plan living and dining area is enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows, capturing serene sea and villa community views and creating a bright, tranquil atmosphere. Both bedrooms are generously sized, ensuring privacy and relaxation, while a dedicated laundry room adds practical convenience to the home.

HADO is a thoughtfully curated, design-led waterfront development inspired by Japanese principles of harmony, balance, and simplicity. The interiors feature refined natural materials, soft neutral palettes, and clean architectural lines, resulting in a timeless and sophisticated coastal living experience.

Residents enjoy access to a comprehensive suite of resort-style amenities, including landscaped zen gardens, swimming pools, a fully equipped fitness studio, yoga and wellness spa, children’s play areas, social lounges, and curated retail spaces — all surrounded by lush greenery and just moments from the beach.

The project offers a highly attractive and investor-friendly 50/50 payment plan:

10% on booking

10% one month from booking

30% during construction

50% on completion

Handover is scheduled for Q3 2029, providing flexibility and strong long-term growth potential.

Strategically positioned on Dubai Islands, HADO ensures seamless connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai International Airport, while preserving the exclusivity and tranquility of island living.

Price: AED 3,911,000
Size: 1,236 sq ft
View: Sea & Villa Community

With limited availability of 2-bedroom units at this price point, this represents one of the best-value offerings in a landmark waterfront development. Enquire today to secure this exceptional residence.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in VELA Viento – Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay.

description:
Turnkey Coastal Serenity with Sunset Views!    
      
Luxury Residences—Dubai’s leading resale and rental agency for Atlantis The Royal Residences and part of the original development sales team—presents this exceptional turnkey home within the new icon of Dubai.    
      
Perfectly positioned to capture golden sunsets, this private residence boasts uninterrupted views across the Arabian Gulf and exquisitely landscaped gardens. Every element has been thoughtfully curated and meticulously enhanced by its current owner to elevate comfort, sophistication, and modern functionality. 
 
Residents of Atlantis The Royal enjoy exclusive Black Tier membership privileges such as 30% discount level to the resort restaurants and spa treatments, and effortless access to world-class amenities, including Michelin-starred dining by global icons, private beach, indoor and outdoor pools, spa and wellness garden, sauna and steam rooms, tennis court, elegant library, resident lounges, business suites, BBQ area with outdoor kitchen, and a state-of-the-art Technogym fitness centre.

The experience is complemented by valet parking, 24-hour concierge services, and a level of discretion and attention to detail found only in the world’s finest 5* branded residences.

Arrange your private viewing today and experience the very definition of coastal elegance and refined living at Atlantis The Royal Residences.
